name: Art Vivant Co., Ltd.
summary: Art Vivant Co., Ltd. operates in the arts related business. The company sells art works, including printed, oil painting, and watercolor products; and arts and crafts, such as sculptures and glass crafts, as well as miscellaneous art goods. It operates in the United States, Europe, China, and Japan. Art Vivant Co., Ltd. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
